name: Only High
short_description: A 3D platformer where you explore the dark cyberpunk world. You have to get way up from the underground facility to the spaceship. Discover secrets, play with friends, drive cars, and many more in Only High.
detailed_description:
You are in a cyberpunk world, at the bottom of the world to be precise, in the underground facility. You need to get out, climb to the top, through Techno City, then Through High City, to the spaceship to reunite with your friend Destiny High.

On the way up, you will face many challenges, discover old secrets, and optionally collect some artifacts. Be aware of the monsters of the past.

You will walk and jump mostly, but some locations will provide you with transport, so don't hesitate to use it.

About gameplay:

  • Classic platformer mechanics: jump, run, crouch. No edge climbing to save you. But you can steer in the air.

  • Multiplayer up to 6 players.

  • You can drive cars.

  • Checkpoint systems, two per level.

  • A level has 3 parts, first easy, then fork where you can pick an easy but long path, or short but hard.

  • Customizable character.

supported_languages:
English*, Russian, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support
